nasb.text: Aaron then shall present the Levites before the Lord as a wave offering from the sons of Israel, that they may qualify to perform the service of the Lord.

esv.text: and Aaron shall offer the Levites before the Lord as a wave offering from the people of Israel, that they may do the service of the Lord.

cnv.text: 亞倫要把利未人獻在耶和華面前，作以色列人中的搖祭，使他們辦理耶和華的事務。

ccb.text: 亚伦要把他们献给耶和华，作为以色列人献的摇祭，使他们可以事奉耶和华。
